Package neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting

Class ParameterFittingStudy.SpecBackedFunction

java.lang.Object
neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting.BaseFunction
neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting.ParameterFittingStudy.SpecBackedFunction
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cloneable, FunctionInterface
Enclosing class:
ParameterFittingStudy
private static final class ParameterFittingStudy.SpecBackedFunction extends BaseFunction
Optimizer-space wrapper that maps transformed parameters back to the physical function.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

      private SpecBackedFunction(BaseFunction delegate, ParameterFittingSpec spec, ParameterUpdateAdapter adapter)

      delegate - physical fitting function
      spec - fitting specification
      adapter - optional parameter update adapter
